reviews.review_title: One of the few meta apps with good UI/UX
reviews.review_description: It is one of the few meta apps with good UI/UX. The software interface is simple, the function buttons are clearly visible on the left, the application loading speed and operation speed are relatively fast, and there is no obvious lag. There is a small detail, that is, when the controller cursor moves to different areas of the button, the small area where the cursor touches the button will lighten. In addition, you can choose multiple emojis when you like, and there are dynamic changes when you choose emojis. Other meta software should also be made according to this standard.

reviews.review_title: I purchased eight oculus quest three 510
reviews.review_description:
“I reached out to customer support in December
2024  regarding a return. 

I sent back my Oculus headset, 

but they returned a refurbished unit without the controllers, charger, or accessories. 
Out of the 8 headsets I purchased,
 I was only trying to return one, 


yet they only sent me back a single refurbished unit. 
The customer service has been extremely disappointing, and communication has been frustrating. It also seems like their meta support team may not be based in North America, which has made resolving the issue even more difficult.”

reviews.review_title: I can't log into Facebook or Instagram
reviews.review_description: I can't log in to Facebook or Instagram on my Meta Quest 3. It just keeps me taking me back to the account center. They all should work together seamlessly. Not the case! Smh

The recent update has fixed the inability to log in for me. The app itself is very basic, but I prefer the simplicity of it. I can hop on the app and see any recent postings from friends and groups. I don't spend much time on fb throughout the year, so this is a good way to just pop in more often and reply to any messages. If you live on fb and need all the features on the website or mobile app, you will not like this one. If you are like me and just want something to see what's going on in your friends' lives (mainly just commenting on family pics), then you will enjoy it for what it is.
Come on .. brand new meta quest 3 and it won’t let me add my account at all.. always sends me to account center. This is total horse crap !! Fix this

reviews.review_title: Flawed & A Step in the Right Direction
reviews.review_description:
I do like that we finally have a real app instead of some pathetic web app... but it's got its own set of issues. It's missing basic navigation tabs and makes zero effort to utilize the immersiveness of Quest headsets.

Ideally, this app should be immediately rewarding to anyone who's ever shot and uploaded 3D, Panoramic, 180° or 360° content to Facebook but it's just not. It has no idea what to do with dynamic content.

Though Facebook could convert 2D pictures into 3D long before Apple, this app doesn't view them in any advantageous way.

It needs to make big moves in immersiveness, this app is not utilizing the Quest's strengths.

I think I have received a band from going to Horizon world because of my previous Facebook incidents￼ and breaching the terms and conditions now when I go to go into a lot of things it says that I have been breaching the terms and conditions and I can’t get anyone to help me. Apparently it’s a band by the developers now I can’t get the full potential of the VR headset. I should have been told about this before I signed up my Facebook account or paid so much money for the VR headset. That’s now half useless to me. Can somebody please help me remove this band what do I have to do?
